entities.label: ActionRequest

entities.short_definition: Actuator Type is a concrete IFC entity in the Object Definition hierarchy, a subtype of IfcDistributionControlElementType. Predefined types include ELECTRICACTUATOR, HANDOPERATEDACTUATOR, HYDRAULICACTUATOR, PNEUMATICACTUATOR, THERMOSTATICACTUATOR.
